name: Adan Calderon
text: Way better planning, steady money, and I actually get more time at home now.

name: Arturo Velazques
text: Got 2 trucks running the same round trip nonstop. Super consistent and no downtime.

name: Jerold Roubik
text: Dan from PFM secured a dedicated lane for our operation, ensuring consistent freight flow and strong profitability across the fleet.

name: German Guerrero
role: Owner-Operator, GG Pride Deliver Services & Trucking LLC
text: I’m picky with my RPM and they get it right. Rates have been solid every time.

name: Mariam Rafat
role: Fleet Owner, Madey Carrier Logistics LLC
text: Managing 7 trucks is way easier with them. Everything just runs smoother.

name: Xiwen Liang
text: Short 50-mile loads on a dedicated lane. Quick, easy, and keeps me moving.

name: Ricardo Ortega
text: Good loads, good rates. My truck stays busy, that’s all I need.

name: Baptiste Milfort
text: Super easy to work with. They take care of everything on the back end.
